steps.t: The corrupted cairn-stones lie to the north of Trac-plas, south-west of Mincham's camp. Mincham asked you to seek out corrupted cairn-stones, examine …
Mincham's camp is north-east of Trac-plas. You should return to Mincham and report that you discovered a strange liquid had been poured on the cairn-s…
